positivePrompt: A young teenage girl named Wishful with psychic abilities and the power to grant wishes stands in a dark alley, her back pressed against the brick wall. She closes her eyes tightly as she concentrates on her ability, reaching out with her mind towards the person who needs their wish granted most. Suddenly, a bright light shines down from above, illuminating the street and revealing a group of thugs approaching Wishful. One of them steps forward, his hand reaching for his gun as he looks at Wishful with malice in his eyes.
